uplink.description: Status report, LPG alarm active, no high-temp alarm, +25.0 C, normal battery (3.0 V)
uplink._note: Oracle: upstream returns LPGAlarm 'alarm' (-> air.gasAlarm true), HighTempAlarm 'noalarm' (-> highTempAlarm false), Temp 25, Volt 3. bytes[4]=1 LPG alarm, bytes[5]=0 no high-temp alarm, bytes[6..7]=0x00FA=250 -> 25.0 C. Covers air.gasAlarm true (gas-detector required key) plus air.temperature and battery.

uplink.description: Status report, no LPG alarm, high-temperature alarm active, +0.3 C, battery 0.1 V
uplink._note: Oracle: upstream returns LPGAlarm 'noalarm' (-> air.gasAlarm false), HighTempAlarm 'alarm' (-> highTempAlarm true), Temp 0.3, Volt 0.1. This is the TTN status-report example input. Covers air.gasAlarm false.

uplink.description: Status report, LPG alarm active, low-battery flag set (byte3 high bit), negative temp -5.0 C
uplink._note: Oracle: upstream returns Volt '3(low battery)' for byte3=158 (0x80|30) and Temp -5 for bytes[6..7]=0xFFCE (two's-complement -50 -> -5.0 C); we surface battery 3.0 V plus the camelCase extra lowBattery true. bytes[4]=1 LPG alarm.

uplink.description: Device-info / startup frame (bytes[2]=0x00) carries no measurement
uplink._note: TTN startup-version-report example input. Upstream emits Device/SWver/HWver/Datecode (no measurement); we report an error since gas-detector needs air.gasAlarm.

uplink.description: Config-response frame on fPort 7 carries no measurement
uplink._note: TTN ConfigReportRsp example input. Upstream emits Cmd/Device/Status config metadata, not a measurement; we reject any non-6 fPort.
